results.Query: Add new node with name new_EK_PORT_30 type EK_PORT, to ju1.a4.m3.s2c2. Return a graph.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-1, add
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = graph_data.copy()
    new_node_name = "new_EK_PORT_30"
    graph_copy.add_node(new_node_name, name=new_node_name, type=["EK_PORT"], physical_capacity_bps=10000000000)
    graph_copy.add_edge("ju1.a4.m3.s2c2", new_node_name, type="RK_CONTAINS")
    updated_graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return {
        "type": "graph",
        "data": updated_graph_json,
        "updated_graph": updated_graph_json
    }
